title: About Pitch My CV | ATS Resume Optimization
description: Learn about Pitch My CV, our mission, and how our ATS-focused tools help job seekers improve resume quality and interview rates.
text_content: About Pitch My CV | ATS Resume Optimization About Pitch My CV Pitch My CV helps job seekers create resumes that are readable by applicant tracking systems and compelling to recruiters. We focus on practical improvements: parse-safe formatting, keyword relevance to job descriptions, and stronger achievement bullet points. Our goal is simple: reduce auto-rejections and increase interview opportunities with transparent, actionable guidance. What we value Clear recommendations, not generic advice Job seeker privacy and control over content Practical resume outcomes over vanity metrics
